transcript: There was a crooked man, who walked a crooked mile. He found a crooked sixpence, against a crooked stack. He bought a crooked cat, and caught a crooked mouse. And they all lived together in a little crooked house Answer me when I call for you! Oh, my God. It's time to get out of the car and go back to the hotel. I'm going to take a taxi to the hotel.
